use tempfile::NamedTempFile;

#[test]
fn test_persist_output() {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), "test data").unwrap();
    tmpfile.persist("/tmp/output.txt").unwrap();
}

#[test]
fn test_keep_temp_file() {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), "important data").unwrap();
    let path = tmpfile.into_temp_path().keep().unwrap();
    assert!(path.exists());
}

#[test]
fn test_persist_and_continue() {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new_in("/tmp").unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), "config data").unwrap();
    let final_path = tmpfile.persist("/tmp/final_config.toml").unwrap();
    let content = std::fs::read_to_string(final_path).unwrap();
    assert_eq!(content, "config data");
}
